channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Panic at Pakistan fuel stations over Iran war
item.description: Long queues formed at fuel stations in Pakistan ahead of a government announcement to raise prices.

item.title: Hezbollah, Israeli troops clash on the ground in eastern Lebanon’s Bekaa
item.description: Lebanese Health Ministry says at least 16 people killed, 35 wounded in Israeli air raids on the town of Nabi Chit.

item.title: Tehran pounded in week two of US-Israel war, Iran targets Israel
item.description: Explosions shake Iran as US-Israel attacks intensify, marking eight days of conflict and retaliation from Iran.

item.title: Indonesian president’s US ties questioned amid public anger over Iran war
item.description: Calls at home for leader of the world's largest Muslim nation to distance from Washington amid US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Iranian missiles intercepted over Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE, Bahrain sirens
item.description: Qatar says it came under a wave of drone attacks, with 10 fired from Iran, nine intercepted.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day eight of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: At least 1,332 people have been reported killed in US-Israeli attacks on Iran since launch of war last weekend.

item.title: Caught between Iran and Saudi Arabia, can Pakistan stay neutral for long?
item.description: As Iran strikes Gulf targets, Pakistan navigates alliance with Riyadh while avoiding confrontation with Tehran.

item.title: Why Yemen’s Houthis are staying out of Israel-US fight with Iran – for now
item.description: Yemen's Houthi leadership cautious, fearing Israeli retaliation following past air strikes and leadership losses.

item.title: Massive explosions, fires from US-Israeli strikes on Tehran
item.description: Massive explosions and fires were seen across Tehran as US-Israeli strikes pummelled targets in the Iranian capital.

item.title: Iranian missiles over Tel Aviv prompt sirens, interceptor launches
item.description: Witness videos captured Iranian projectiles soaring over Tel Aviv as sirens blared and Israeli interceptors launched.
